params.deps: { stateMachine: <section-3 instance>, strategyTable: <section-2 module>, dom: { btnHint: HTMLElement, hintDisplay: HTMLElement, reviewPanel: HTMLElement } }

wireHintAndReview(deps).notes: App-shell calls wireHintAndReview once after mountUI has populated the DOM, passing the state-machine instance, the strategy-table module, and references to the DOM nodes ui-render created. hint-and-review attaches the Hint button click handler and subscribes to state-machine state changes to populate the review panel on hand resolution.

notes: App-shell is the wiring site. hint-and-review does not look up DOM nodes by id itself — it receives them via the deps object so the wiring is testable and the DOM contract is explicit. App-shell does not implement hint or review behavior.
